{{Quote|This is the Kolatill Council…all New Republic forces, please send assistance immediately. After imprisoning the Imperial governor we have been attacked by TIE bombers. Domaz, our capital, is in flames. Please send emergency medical assistance.|Distress call from Kolatill|<ref name="O" />}}
'''Domaz''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kolatill]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the [[Trition Trade Route]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Placed under martial law by its [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the population of the city eventually rebelled [[8 ABY/Legends|eight years later]], overthrowing the Imperial authorities after news of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] successful [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] capital [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] reached them. In retaliation, the Imperial [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Kathol Protector]]'' deployed [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] to [[Bombing of Domaz|attack]] the city, which they left ruined and in flames. The survivors banded together and began recovery and relief efforts. They were assisted by the crew of the New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', as well as medical [[Starship/Legends|ships]] provided by Governor [[Monjai]], the New Republic administrator of Kal'Shebbol.

==Description==
Domaz was situated on [[Kolatill]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the [[Trition Trade Route]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. As the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of Kolatill, Domaz was the location of the planetary government—this was usually the [[Kolatill Council]], but [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tetrum]] ruled the planet from [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] in the name of both the Galactic Empire, and later, the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]. The city was divided into several districts, which included a capital district, several residential districts, and outlying neighborhoods. The heart of the city was dominated by a large park, and Domaz had at least one [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] within its limits.<ref name="O" />

==History==
In 0 ABY, Moff Kentor Sarne, Imperial ruler of the Kathol sector, appointed Governor Tetrum to oversee the planet of Kolatill. Acting on Sarne's orders, he placed the world under martial law, and turned the planet's extensive [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] industry into a war machine to supply Sarne's [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] with combat [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]]. The Empire enforced martial law in Domaz along with all other settlements, arrested the Kolatill Council, and Tetrum used the city as his base.<ref name="O" /> In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Moff Sarne seceded from the Empire, and established his own warlord regime that included Kolatill within its borders.<ref name="TDC">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref>

In 8 ABY,<ref name="Date" /> following news that Sarne had been [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|ousted]] from the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] capital of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|forces]],<ref name="TSB">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> the population of Kolatill [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] their Imperial governor and declared their allegiance to the New Republic. In retaliation, the Imperial [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Kathol Protector]]'' arrived [[Kolatill system/Legends|in-system]] and launched [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]]. They [[Bombing of Domaz|assaulted]] the city with conventional explosive weapons, leaving many areas reduced to rubble and much of the capital in flames. The Kolatill Council, having been restored to power with the incarceration of Governor Tetrum, sent out a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress call]] to the New Republic forces at Kal'Shebbol. The transmission was intercepted by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the planet at the time. The [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] left for Kolatill immediately, while the newly-installed New Republic Governor [[Monjai]] promised to send medical relief [[Starship/Legends|ships]] as soon as she was able to.<ref name="O" />

Following the attack, the large park in the middle of the city was turned into an emergency landing field and aid station, with scores of makeshift tents for those who had been injured or made homeless during the attack. A teenager, [[Lon Bennor]], took responsibility for organizing the recovery efforts, distributing medical aid and care to those who needed it. Another citizen named [[Tren (Kolatill)|Tren]] oversaw the allotment of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] to the survivors. Four [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the attack, the ''FarStar'' arrived in orbit, and sent [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] with relief teams to the surface. They brought medical aid and supplies to assist in the recovery efforts.<ref name="O" />

Recovery efforts around Domaz increased, with many citizens forming volunteer groups to tend to the injured, coordinate rescue efforts, and fight the many fires that burned around the city. Former Imperial [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] who had been on the planet at the time assisted in the relief operations, discarding their weapons and joining the volunteer forces. Help arrived from other cities, as convoys ferried in food and medical supplies. However, the vehicles had to be guarded from wild animals and looters that sought to prey on the misfortune of the city. By night, wild creatures from beyond Domaz's limits came into the city to scavenge for food, forcing the citizens to post patrols and guards to safeguard the civilian refugee camps.<ref name="O" />

==Inhabitants==
The city of Domaz had several notable residents, including [[Council]]or [[Kause]], one of the last surviving members of the Kolatill Council; Lon Bennor, a young teenager who organized medical relief efforts in the wake of the attack; and Tren, a middle-aged man who ran the food distribution service following the assault.<ref name="O" />

==Behind the scenes==
Domaz was created for the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying adventure]] ''[[Omens]]'' by [[Bill Smith]], which appeared in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', published by [[West End Games]]. Assisting in relief efforts in and around the city is one of the players' first tasks in the adventure, and several encounters are suggested to test the [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] skills of the individuals playing the game.<ref name="O" />

==Appearances==
